name: SidebarComponents
description: SidebarItem (nav row — leading icon/indicator, badge/notification/shortcut, collapsed rail mode, active accent bar), HeaderCard + SidebarHeader (workspace/brand switcher card with a divider wrapper), UserProfileCard + SidebarFooter (signed-in user card with a divider wrapper), and SidebarFeatureCard (6 promo/widget types x 4 styles — Daily Meeting/Progress Bar/Icon & Link/Left Icon/Support/Cloud Storage x Stroke/Gray/Primary/Neutral).
sourceNote: Ported from Figma nodes 3741:45019 (Sidebar Item), 3802:10204 (Header Card), 3789:3886 (Sidebar Header), 3802:11038 (User Profile Card), 3789:5341 (Sidebar Footer), 3789:3551 (Feature Cards). SidebarFeatureCard's 24 Figma variants (6 types x 4 styles) collapsed into one component with a `type` + `style` prop pair, reusing existing Avatar/ProgressBar/LinkButton/CompactButton rather than re-implementing each combination — matching the project's established leading-slot-collapsing pattern. ProgressBar/Cloud-Storage percentages are real, driven by a `percentage` prop, not Figma's static 80%/90% demo. First component family filed under the new 'Product Components > Navigation > Sidebar Components' Storybook category.
